channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Anthropic Urges Congress to Crack Down on AI Distillation By Chinese Rivals
item.description: Anthropic alleged that Alibaba-affiliated operators used nearly 25,000 fraudulent accounts to generate 28.8 million Claude exchanges.

item.title: Bitcoin bounces off new 2026 price lows: Will US stock weakness push BTC lower?
item.description: Bitcoin’s trek into new 2026 lows continued as spot BTC ETF outflows, a bearish monthly options expiry and Strategy’s unrealized losses widened its gap with AI-connected stock returns.

item.title: Polymarket to Refund Users After Scammers Swipe Millions in Website Exploit
item.description: Hackers infiltrated Polymarket’s website via a compromised third-party vendor, the company said, swiping millions in crypto from users.

item.title: Asset management giant Invesco files for tokenized fund targeting stablecoin reserve market
item.description: The $2.5 trillion asset manager deepens its blockchain push after taking over Superstate's tokenized money market fund as fund manager earlier this year.

item.title: Bitcoin options traders hedge downside as uncertainty lingers, Anchorage says
item.description: Anchorage Digital’s latest analysis shows Bitcoin options traders remain defensive as near-term uncertainty persists, though markets are not pricing an extreme downside scenario for Strategy.

item.title: Bitcoin may fall lower but BTC power-law frames crash to $58K as ‘normal’
item.description: Bitcoin’s drop to $58,000 lines up with the power-law model’s cycle lows, even though futures market data points to deeper lows for BTC price.

item.title: SBI Holdings Says $289 Million Bitbank Deal Will Make It Japan's Largest Crypto Exchange
item.description: SBI Holdings has agreed to a nearly $289 million deal to acquire crypto exchange Bitbank, pending regulatory approval.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Coinbase-Backed Ethereum Network Base Recovers After Block Production Issue
item.description: Ethereum layer-2 network Base was down for more than two hours as it ran into an issue with block production ahead of a planned upgrade.

item.title: Half of UK wealth advisers say clients' crypto is ‘invisible’ to them: CoinShares survey
item.description: A CoinShares survey found than many EU-based wealth management companies had policies that restricted investments in digital assets or provided no guidance on the matter.

item.title: Story Protocol Rebrands as Data Network in AI Training Pivot After IP Token Falls 98%
item.description: Intellectual property network Story Protocol has shifted its focus to a new opportunity in training data for artificial intelligence.

item.title: CoinEx Denies 'Knowledge' of Aiding Sanctioned Iran Crypto Market in $3.8 Billion Disconnect
item.description: TRM Labs said it uncovered over $3.84 billion in crypto flows between CoinEx and a web of more than 60 sanctioned Iranian platforms.

item.title: Coinbase's Base blockchain resumes after two-hour outage disrupted network
item.description: The incident temporarily halted transaction processing on one of Ethereum's largest layer-2 networks.

item.title: Bitcoin drop to $58K brings out bears: Is BTC’s next stop below $50K?
item.description: Bitcoin’s crash to $58,000 confirmed a bear flag breakdown, setting a new price target of $54,000 or lower.

item.title: Strategy's yield-generating STRC stock is more correlated with BTC than ever
item.description: The tightening correlation undermines STRC's appeal as a relatively steadier income vehicle.

item.title: AI Took Your Job? California Wants to Know
item.description: California launched the nation's first AI unemployment tracker as policymakers race to determine whether warnings of an AI-driven jobs shakeup are becoming a reality.

item.title: Kraken in talks to buy 15% stake in DeFi lender Aave at $385 million valuation
item.description: The DeFi lender is rebuilding after the fallout from April's KelpDAO exploit sparked a multibillion-dollar exodus of deposits despite Aave itself not being hacked.

item.title: XRP risks drop below $1, but onchain data highlights silver lining
item.description: XRP’s chance of a daily close below $1 are rising, but whale accumulation and shrinking exchange supply may be a sign that traders are buying.

item.title: JUST IN: Coinbase's 'Base' blockchain has been down for over an hour. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5CYnlKdDhpRDZNSFg1Z2cxT0hNRnFEN19IbGJjQmV0b2JiMUtWLS1rSC1oclF2NlZUTXBUNzQ2ZzV2YlZScHNYczZRYXllcHY5ZkRCazRpU01zX0s3NkxzaEhn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Coinbase's 'Base' blockch…

item.title: a16z-backed crypto firm rebrands, shifts focus to solving AI’s global copyright headache
item.description: The startup formerly known as Story Protocol raised $140 million to secure internet rights and is now building an audit layer for data consent, licensing, and provenance for tech firms.

item.title: 21shares trims 2026 crypto forecasts despite institutional adoption gains
item.description: Asset manager 21shares sees crypto infrastructure advancing faster than prices, as ETFs, stablecoins and prediction markets mature while several 2026 targets slip.

item.title: Kraken, Maple launch onchain warehouse facility for crypto-backed institutional loans
item.description: Kraken's new facility with Maple brings a traditional warehouse financing model onchain, allowing the exchange to expand its institutional crypto lending business using blockchain-based structured credit.

item.title: Traders Predict More Pain for Bitcoin and Ethereum After Monthly Drops Above 20%
item.description: Bitcoin touched its lowest price in 21 months early Thursday—and prediction market users don't see the crypto carnage ceasing imminently.

item.title: South Korean authorities fine Bithumb $136K over sharing user information overseas
item.description: The fine comes after an investigation concluded that Bithumb shared information with many overseas exchanges in violation of laws intended to protect user data.

item.title: BlackBerry is making a massive comeback as an 'uncrashable' software layer for AI and robotics
item.description: BlackBerry's stock is surging after the company's massive earnings beat and is pivoting into becoming a critical component of the AI and robotics boom.

item.title: Strategy has a 10-month cash runway for dividends, but retail investors are losing faith
item.description: STRC was marketed as a low volatility income product designed to trade near $100, and its sharp decline has undermined investor trust.

item.title: Bitcoin drops to $58K on high US PCE inflation as trader sees 'manipulation'
item.description: Bitcoin fell to 21-month lows as stock market volatility accompanied three-year highs in US PCE inflation, leading to $600 million in hourly crypto liquidations.

item.title: BITCOIN SLIDES AS ETF OUTFLOWS SPIKE Bitcoin fell below $60,000 after nearly $500 million flowed out of spot Bitcoin ETFs on Wednesday. Crypto markets also saw $660 million in liquidations, with long positions taking the biggest hit. Ethereum and XRP - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE85bmJHS3BFaXhPV3JmTFBISnoyOS1nVV9HMkRtNzByRW1qTXNZbTFrS2lSMTBEU0ZmTEVrNFRnSG1XbHdmNEdwd0NJWmZkTFlZdXA3UTdqdzVxNUdGZmc?oc=5" target="_blank">BITCOIN SLIDES AS ETF OUTFLOWS SPIKE Bi…

item.title: Quant fund says bitcoin is near a major inflection point as rare onchain signals align
item.description: Hyperion Decimus' Chris Sullivan said four historically reliable indicators have aligned, leaving bitcoin one move away from confirming a major turning point.

item.title: Bitcoin tumbles to new multi-year low of $58,000, but a short-squeeze setup emerges
item.description: Derivatives markets signal that betting on further slide in prices is getting overcrowded, setting up for a potential snapback.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Bitcoin: planning for inheritance
item.description: Your bitcoin isn’t just an asset; it’s a future. Ensure your loved ones can access it with a solid inheritance plan for when you're no longer here.

item.title: Why Wall Street values some crypto firms for AI power, not just crypto
item.description: Galaxy Digital’s stock surge points to a new trend: Investors are rewarding some crypto firms for AI infrastructure, not just digital asset exposure.

item.title: Story Protocol rebrands to DATA Foundation in AI pivot
item.description: Story Protocol is now the DATA Foundation as it aims to provide licensable data to AI firms that have “run out of internet to scrape.”

item.title: Bitcoin likely to fall another 30% to $44,000 by year-end, prominent BTC miner says
item.description: An early miner says Strategy's stock mNAV has fallen to 0.72, near the level that marked the last cycle's turn, and that bitcoin historically bottoms about six months after that signal.

item.title: Bitcoin Plummets Lower as Strategy's STRC Dives Further From $100 Mark
item.description: The price of Bitcoin rapidly fell to nearly $58,000 after Strategy's STRC preferred shares notched a new low and MSTR fell alongside.

item.title: JUST IN: bitcoin:native flash crashes from $61K to $58K in under an hour, with $430M liquidated in the past hour alone and total 24-hour liquidations hitting $1.26B across 209,000 traders. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBiYVBpXzhWd3Y2allOZjhLZHkzcjZaYTFQbXV2VEhWX3FfSThiSlNzODRxNC1rYzc0RGRoYml1NGwtSEFEOTVLdmIzYzhOWjlxSXY4WTFvMUxIR3h0TVE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: bitcoin:native flash crashes f…

item.title: BREAKING: Crypto sees $450 million worth of levered long positions liquidated in just 60 minutes. Amid the liquidation, Bitcoin fell to $58,000, a fresh 21-month low. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE03LXNkel9mQ0tXamNNOWdjeF96ZGV5bnNVQkZDSjNUazdJZWNKZDdsN0phbkVSNDRKT1hPdktTaUtXN2ZROGpwQmtub0MwQ0NVOC00cTlXVzd5X01LT1JTNHpYSVcxdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Crypto sees $450 m…

item.title: JUST IN: $500,000,000 liquidated from the crypto market in the past 60 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1EVTNQNFFPNGZQWG95UFlHOVBwamI0cGVlcjhQY3J2U3V1LXY4bFEtQzJ4UEt1bk4wVTZGTVE5YWNBSm95bHdwUzhyZW1BTjRtSjdGWDNaTFJnWFhPMlQzS3p3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $500,000,000 liquidated f…

item.title: The US Crypto Spot ETF Aggregate Dashboard is now live on SoSoValue. In 2024, SoSoValue launched the world’s first dedicated US Crypto Spot ETF Dashboard, giving global crypto investors a clearer, faster, and more structured way to track ETF capital flo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5LYndSRzc0cENRZUdhdDZ1QWtkeXgzOG1hMVFkb0M1Rld5VzVCMU81MGMtYzFuRjA3REU4SXM5dk9XcTE3RVh0X1pfb0swOWJka1ktZ1JpTlNTRUZDelBVYzFOTVY1ejg?oc=5" target="_blank">The US Crypto Spot ETF Aggr…

item.title: Kraken sues crypto derivatives firm PowerTrade over 'misappropriated' funds claim
item.description: PowerTrade changed Kraken’s positive balance of more than $6 million to a $2 million deficit via a series of unauthorized “corrections” related to trades that had expired or settled months earlier, according to a legal filing.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE gains 10.1% as index rises
item.description: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 5.8% from Wednesday, joined Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

item.title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
item.description: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.

item.title: Uniswap, Spark aim to build stablecoin FX market as banks, fintechs enter the industry
item.description: The protocols are building shared liquidity and trading infrastructure for a future with hundreds of competing digital currencies on blockchain rails.

item.title: Post-prison CZ says time behind bars didn't hurt the billionaire's business after Binance
item.description: The pardoned ex-CEO called prison a character-building "plus" as he's pursued a venture-capital career, despite his majority stake in the world's biggest crypto exchange.

item.title: About 60% of World Cup bettors on Polymarket are first-time crypto users
item.description: Polymarket emerged as an onboarding layer for about 60% of World Cup bettors, who interacted with the blockchain for the first time during their prediction market entry.

item.title: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity
item.description: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

item.title: $47M in Crypto Frozen in Global Infostealer Takedown: Europol
item.description: Police disrupted SocGholish, Amadey, and StealC, malware that harvests crypto wallets and passwords, freezing €41 million in crypto.

item.title: Circle and Nomura join forces to target a $440 billion daily foreign exchange market in Japan
item.description: The stablecoin giant and the Japanese financial corporation plan to deploy cross-border foreign exchange settlements as early as next year.

item.title: Binance faces EU service limits next week as MiCA rules take effect
item.description: Binance will limit EU onboarding and services from July 1 under MiCA rules after failing to gain authorization from a member state, while withdrawals remain available for users.

item.title: Morning Minute: Strategy’s MSTR and STRC Crash to 52-Week Lows
item.description: A massive Micron earnings beat has lifted global markets, pushing crypto higher after yesterday's nasty sell off took BTC sub-$60k.

item.title: Circle, Nomura eye Japan corporate FX with stablecoin settlement: Report
item.description: Circle and Nomura are reportedly partnering to enable stablecoin-based foreign exchange settlement for Japanese companies as the country's regulated blockchain-based financial infrastructure expands.

item.title: Bitcoin derivatives signal panic. A weak core PCE reading could trigger snapback.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 25, 2026

item.title: CoinEx denies claims it served as $3.84 billion gateway to sanctioned Iranian crypto firms
item.description: Blockchain analysts TRM Labs says CoinEx facilitated more than $3.8 billion in blockchain-traced flows with sanctioned Iranian crypto entities. CoinEx disputes the findings.

item.title: Crypto relief rally fails to shake persistent bearish derivatives signal
item.description: A relief rally tied to recovering U.S. equities lifted BTC and ETH off weekly lows, but bearish derivatives positioning and negative CVD suggest the rebound may be fragile.

item.title: Kalshi Seeks $40B Valuation Weeks After $1B Raise: FT
item.description: The prediction market seeks a valuation near double the $22 billion it hit last month, as a federal-state fight over regulation escalates.

item.title: Bitcoin supply in loss reaches record high 10.83 million BTC
item.description: Almost 11 million bitcoin are now held at a loss, while long-term holders control a record 14.8 million coins.

item.title: Bitcoin will likely bottom BELOW Realized Price (~$53k), just like it did in EVERY previous bear market. Right now the grey Realized Price line has been glued to the black 200-week Geometric MA line since 2023. What do you think: new low incoming or differ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5LdmszOHRZV1JFSGpwU3NicWlwSmc5OHFVdDNmRllaR0VJSTNQd3FrQjVZQjhIV0RJM2Q0LV96eG9LeEdqTTEtN1Y2UFhZcllqSmxjS3RpWFNoWGxHVEpLZEtVUkpyZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin will likely bottom B…

item.title: Iran-linked entities moved $3.8B through CoinEx, TRM says
item.description: TRM Labs traced $3.8 billion moved by 60 sanctioned Iranian entities through CoinEx and said that the exchange’s 8% share of illicit transactions was substantially higher than its counterparts.

item.title: Indonesia sets certification rules for influencers recommending crypto
item.description: Indonesia’s financial regulator will require influencers recommending crypto and other digital assets to hold relevant certifications as regulators worldwide tighten oversight of finfluencers.

item.title: According to SoSoValue data, on June 24 (Eastern Time), Bitcoin spot ETFs recorded a total net outflow of USD 469 million, while Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC saw the largest single-day net inflow at USD 23.5642 million. Ethereum spot ETFs recorde - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBLMHB4ZnB4U0dtYXU1Ukp0LWJfMVJUZVFyX0xabHpjZFh2dnEzUGlac2VJYVRHZTd6X1NKZEpvZDZDV0RPX3E5N0NxV1ZkV09uZjVSaWhOWVlieUljNVJUeEhJZw?oc=5" target="_blank">According to SoSoValue data, on …
